text: Franklin Resources (BEN) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.63 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.60 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.82 per share a year ago.

title: Franklin Resources, Inc. Announces Third Quarter Results
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Resources, Inc. title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Elects New Director to Board
text: WALTHAM, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE:TMO), the world leader in serving science, today announced Jenny Johnson, president and chief executive officer of Franklin Resources, Inc. (NYSE:BEN), has been elected to its board of directors. The appointment brings the total number of Thermo Fisher board members to 12. title: Angelo Gordon-backed REIT in $300 mln bid for Western Asset Mortgage
text: AG Mortgage Investment Trust Inc , a real estate investment trust (REIT) managed by Angelo Gordon & Co, made a stock-and-cash offer on Thursday for Western Asset Mortgage Capital Corp , a peer managed by Franklin Resources Inc , that values it at about $300 million, including debt.

title: Franklin Resources, Inc. Announces Month-End Assets Under Management
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Resources, Inc. (Franklin Templeton) (NYSE: BEN) today reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $1.43 trillion at June 30, 2023, compared to $1.40 trillion at May 31, 2023. This month's increase in AUM reflected the impact of positive markets and modest long-term net inflows. text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years. title: Franklin Resources, Inc. to Announce Third Quarter Results on July 28, 2023
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--On Friday, July 28, 2023 at approximately 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, Franklin Resources, Inc. (the “Company”) [NYSE:BEN] will release its third quarter operating results. A written commentary on the results will also be available via investors.franklinresources.com at approximately 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.
